chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-227 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.05.2022 Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State. == At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the applicant that he would not press the disposal of instant criminal miscellaneous application provided disposal of the F.I.R of the applicant is converted from ‘B’ to ‘C’ Class which is not opposed by learned Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh fro the State. Order accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*,
